message:
feat(assert): implement assert.doesNotThrow for 100% test coverage

Added missing assert.doesNotThrow polyfill implementation in node_polyfill.js

Test Results:
- Before: 102/103 pass (99%)
- After: 103/103 pass (100%) ✅

The function follows Node.js semantics:
- Executes the provided function
- If function throws, throws an Error with custom or default message
- If function doesn't throw, returns normally

This completes the AOT stability work with perfect test coverage.
